articles.title: Edgecombe makes history with 30-10 to stun C's
articles.original_title: Edgecombe makes history with 30-10 to stun C's
articles.summary: VJ Edgecombe had 30 points and 10 rebounds while playing through pain after taking a hard fall on his back early in the game, Tyrese Maxey scored 29 points, and the 76ers beat the Celtics 111-97 to tie their series at one game apiece.
